prestazioni: Engine swap to a 4A-GE 20V 'Silver Top' (AE101/111) with individual throttle bodies (ITBs) from a Toyota Corolla GT-Apex, paired with a custom 4-2-1 stainless steel header by HKS Super Power Flow and a Tomei 80mm titanium exhaust system with a 2.5-inch diameter and straight-through muffler for optimized scavenging

Forced induction via a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) on a custom manifold by Trust/GReddy, mated to a GReddy Type-S intercooler (front-mount, 600x300x76mm core) and a custom 3-inch aluminum charge piping system with HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve

Full standalone engine management via Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with custom wiring harness by Wireworks, integrated with a Link G4+ Monsoon for dual ECU redundancy, paired with a set of Denso Iridium IK22 spark plugs gapped at 0.8mm and a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump with an Aeromotive FPR for 40psi base fuel pressure
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V1 widebody conversion kit (PN: RB-TOY90-01) with custom 3-piece overfenders in carbon fiber (dry carbon, 2x2 twill weave) and extended front/rear bumpers with integrated diffuser by Veilside Fortune 03 (modified for Marino chassis mounting points)

Custom 17x9.5 +22 and 17x10.5 +35 Work Meister S1 3P wheels in gunmetal finish, wrapped in 225/45R17 and 255/40R17 Toyo R888R tires, paired with custom bolt-on spacers (15mm front, 25mm rear) by 5Zigen for aggressive flush fitment

Full OEM+ JDM restomod: Toyota Techno Craft (TRD) Marino-specific front lip spoiler (PN: 00251-TR201), rear ducktail spoiler from a 1993 Toyota Sprinter Trueno GT-Apex (AE101), and custom rear quarter window delete panels in 1.2mm aluminum with louvered vents by Autoexe
